name: Hillgrove Resources Limited
analysis: HGO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0525. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0540, stop A$0.0465, target A$0.0610 (0.94:1) — then trail it.
